# Project: Alpha

## Objective
> Build a recruiting pipeline automation tool.

## Context
This project uses the MiniMax API for text generation and runs on Node.js. We work closely with Bravo Corp on the integration. The approach is inspired by Karpathy's LLM wiki architecture for knowledge capture.

## Status
Shipped v1 in March 2026. Now working on v2 with streaming support.
